name: vantage
description: Vantage is a cloud observability and optimization platform that aggregates cloud infrastructure costs acros...

interface.shortDescription: Vantage is a cloud observability and optimization platform that aggregates cloud infrastructure costs acros...
interface.longDescription: Vantage is a cloud observability and optimization platform that aggregates cloud infrastructure costs across providers to deliver a centralized view into total cloud spend. Vantage has multiple tools for optimizing cloud spend and provides organizations with advanced FinOps workflows and cost governance.
defaultPrompt: Summarize the current cloud cost picture in Vantage
